headline: Apple CEO Tim Cook Just Bought Nike Stock. His Last Purchase Didn’t Go So Well.
summary: Cook is Nike’s lead independent director and has been on the company board since 2005.  Cook bought $3 million worth of shares in Nike at the end of December.  After the purchase, Cook holds 130,480 Nike shares, worth about $5.7 million based on Tuesday’s closing price.
